task.description: Add a comment near the transition IDs dict documenting what each transition does.

l1.llm_content:
{
  "edit_description": "Add comment near transition IDs dict documenting what each transition does.",
  "target_files": ["scripts/jira-drain.py"],
  "patch_commands": [
    "sed -i 's/transition_ids\\s*\\{[^}]*\\}/transition_ids\\s*\\{\\n  comment: \"Each transition is documented below.\\n\\n  - \\1\\n\\}/' scripts/jira-drain.py",
    "sed -i 's/transition_ids\\s*\\}\\ntransition_ids\\s*\\{[^}]*\\}/transition_ids\\s*\\}\\n  comment: \"Each transition is documented below.\\n\\n  - \\1\\n\\}/' scripts/jira-drain.py"
  ],
  "expected_outcome": "success looks like",
  "risk_notes": "Ensure no syntax errors in the existing transition_ids dict.",
  "follow_up_type": "none|needs_review"
}

parsed.edit_description: Add comment near transition IDs dict documenting what each transition does.
patch_commands:
sed -i 's/transition_ids\s*\{[^}]*\}/transition_ids\s*\{
  comment: "Each transition is documented below.

  - \1
\}/' scripts/jira-drain.py
parsed.risk_notes: Ensure no syntax errors in the existing transition_ids dict.
